kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=vidaativa, url=http://localhost:3000/api, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/usuarios/login path_url=/api/usuarios/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '57', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"email": "t7.teste@vidaativa.com", "senha": "123456789"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Get From Dictionary
kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.name: Get From Dictionary
kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

test.name: CT01 - T7: Deve retornar erro 400 ao submeter avaliacao sem aceitar o termo medico

kw.name: Create List
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: Create List
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/usuarios/73b2a17b-cb0c-407e-a0ad-9f469267df8f/avaliacao path_url=/api/usuarios/73b2a17b-cb0c-407e-a0ad-9f469267df8f/avaliacao headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '75', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"aceitouAvisoMedico": false, "respostas": [3, 4], "limitacoesFisicas": []}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

test.doc: RN01 / US01 — Entrada Inválida: Aviso médico não aceito. O backend deve barrar a submissão e retornar erro 400.

test.name: CT02 - T7: Deve processar a avaliacao com sucesso com todas as perguntas respondidas

kw.name: Create List
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: Create List
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/usuarios/73b2a17b-cb0c-407e-a0ad-9f469267df8f/avaliacao path_url=/api/usuarios/73b2a17b-cb0c-407e-a0ad-9f469267df8f/avaliacao headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '74', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"aceitouAvisoMedico": true, "respostas": [3, 4], "limitacoesFisicas": []}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

test.doc: RN01 / US01 — Entrada Válida: Todas as perguntas respondidas e termo aceito. O sistema deve retornar 200 e definir o perfil clínico do usuário.

kw.name: Delete All Sessions
kw.doc: Removes all the session objects
